name: Golden Cheddar Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese.
3. In another bowl, mix together the milk, melted butter, and beaten egg.
4. Add the wet mixture to the dry mixture, stirring until just moistened.
5. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
